name: GOLD RESOURCE CORP
business: Gold Resource Corporation is a mining company that produces gold, silver, and base metals (copper, lead, zinc) from its Don David Gold Mine in Oaxaca, Mexico. The company sells gold and silver doré and concentrates to smelters and refiners for further processing.

exposures.sentence: During the year ended December 31, 2025, two customers accounted for 99% of the Company's revenue from DDGM.
